Compliance.description: ICASA licensed; historical R5bn fine; compliance improving but legacy issues weigh on score.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.38/5; consistently poor; app 3.8/5 mixed; high complaint volume.

Product Value.description: Competitive data bundles; YFello brand; wide network; 5G rollout; some roaming value.

Innovation.description: 5G leadership, MoMo financial services, YFello MVNO, digital self-service, SME solutions.

Customer Support.description: Call centre, stores, app, social; overwhelmed; complaints of no resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: National network; SIM swap fraud risk; POPIA compliance; app security features.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Prepaid data from R49/1GB; Smart S from R199/mo; various bundles

socialSentiment.summary: Network quality positive; billing/support very negative on social.
